name: RABIT
short_description: RABIT is an arcade style platforming game with retro graphics and a mysterious atmosphere. Its central mechanic is the ability to toggle certain objects on and off at the click of a button. This along with several other movement abilities allows for some devious and exciting platforming sections.
detailed_description:
RABIT is a simple but challenging 2D platformer with multiple movement abilities and the power to toggle certain blocks on and off on a whim. Toggle, dash, wall-jump and stomp your way to the top of a mysterious virtual world - and maybe even uncover some of its forgotten history along the way!

Save your high scores on a classic arcade-style top 10 screen, entering your initials as you would on an classic arcade cabinet. Then check out your friend's high scores on the steam leaderboard.
